description: A vertical graphic over a dark blue image of a glowing fingerprint with network lines and dots. White text at the top reads Applying for immigration benefits? We require biometrics. Bold white text below reads They confirm your identity and help us stop immigration fraud. A Department of Homeland Security seal and the words U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services appear beneath the text.
notable_text: Applying for immigration benefits? We require biometrics.; They confirm your identity and help us stop immigration fraud.; U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services
